flowSpec.goal: produce a bounded CRM core slice through a sequential prompt-language run that can be forcibly interrupted immediately before verification and then resumed

nodes.text: Work only inside the current workspace root. Treat `.factory/` as frozen control input except for `.factory/checkpoints/pre-verification-ready`, which is reserved for the recovery harness.

position.text: prompt: Work only inside the current workspace root. Treat `.factory/` as frozen control input except for `.factory/checkpoints/pre-verification-ready`, which is reserved for the recovery harness.

nodes.text: Write docs/prd.md and docs/acceptance-criteria.md for a bounded CRM core covering contacts, companies, opportunities, stage transitions, tasks, notes, and dashboard summaries. Keep the scope small and implementation-ready.

position.text: prompt: Write docs/prd.md and docs/acceptance-criteria.md for a bounded CRM core covering contacts, companies, opportunities, stage transitions, tasks, notes, and dashboard summaries. Keep the scope small and implementation-ready.

nodes.text: Write docs/architecture/domain-model.md, docs/api-contracts.md, and specs/invariants.md for the same bounded CRM core. Favor pure TypeScript domain logic and in-memory application services.

position.text: prompt: Write docs/architecture/domain-model.md, docs/api-contracts.md, and specs/invariants.md for the same bounded CRM core. Favor pure TypeScript domain logic and in-memory application services.

nodes.text: Build packages/domain/src/index.ts plus focused tests under packages/domain/test for contacts, companies, opportunities, stage transitions, tasks, notes, and dashboard summaries. Keep the module deterministic and dependency-free.

position.text: prompt: Build packages/domain/src/index.ts plus focused tests under packages/domain/test for contacts, companies, opportunities, stage transitions, tasks, notes, and dashboard summaries. Keep the module deterministic and dependency-free.

nodes.text: Build packages/api/src/index.ts plus focused tests under packages/api/test for in-memory application services that create contacts, create opportunities, move stages, add tasks and notes, and compute dashboard summaries. Depend only on the local domain package.

position.text: prompt: Build packages/api/src/index.ts plus focused tests under packages/api/test for in-memory application services that create contacts, create opportunities, move stages, add tasks and notes, and compute dashboard summaries. Depend only on the local domain package.

nodes.text: Write README.md, docs/handover.md, and docs/test-strategy.md from the implemented workspace, but do not start lint, typecheck, or test until the checkpoint file is created.

position.text: prompt: Write README.md, docs/handover.md, and docs/test-strategy.md from the implemented workspace, but do not start lint, typecheck, or test until the checkpoint file is created.
